title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Sanofi India

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Sanofi India
jsonLd.description:
Sanofi India has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Pune office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Sanofi India:
Sanofi India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sanofi India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
